cycle_phase: Day-2 dawn MYT — 5th overnight/pre-dawn pass (07:10 MYT 19 Jul); FIRST cycle with genuinely new content after 4 consecutive zero-delta overnight passes. Utusan published 2 brand-new PIR-07 articles at 06:40 & 06:45 MYT 19 Jul (22:40 & 22:45 UTC 18 Jul). Malaysiakini homepage rotated, surfacing 23 'new' priority titles (mostly 10-22h-old nomination-day articles re-entering the top feed). Daytime MYT Day-2 campaign window opening.
source_urls_required: All content carries source URL; Google News items cite publisher + gnews reference (post-2024 gnews article URLs are protobuf-encrypted and not reversibly decodable)

cycle_summary.cycle_character: FIRST NEW-CONTENT CYCLE after 4 consecutive zero-delta overnight passes (182751/194028/205755/220325). At 07:10 MYT 19 Jul (Day-2 dawn), Utusan published 2 genuinely brand-new PIR-07 articles at 06:40 & 06:45 MYT 19 Jul (22:40 & 22:45 UTC 18 Jul): 'Lima kerusi panas jadi tumpuan' (5 hot/battleground seats with FULL candidate matchups) and 'Tiga gabungan bertembung' (3 coalitions' strategies; confirms Bersatu contests 24 DUN seats under its OWN name/logo for the first time and CLASHES WITH PN CANDIDATES IN 7 SEATS; PH all 36, BN 25+PN 11; 103 total candidates; seat structure 11 two-cornered / 21 three-cornered / 2 four-cornered / 2 five-cornered; youngest 23 Leevineshwaraan Bersatu, oldest 70 Abd.Latif PH; campaign to 11:59pm 31 Jul). Malaysiakini homepage rotated, surfacing 23 'new' priority titles — mostly 10-22h-old nomination-day content re-entering the top feed; PIR-06 substance (Goodbye PN / Bersatu exit imminent / Muhyiddin raps Samsuri) already fully captured at 170837 and reconfirmed, but PIR-07 battleground + PIR-09 component-party items (Wee 'not a merger', Tamim/independent, KiniGuide, nominations full-force, DAP anti-BN) freshly captured this cycle. NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads amid BN-PN cooperation' (pubDate 23:00 GMT 18 Jul) is NEW corroborative PIR-06 — headline captured, full text deferred (gnews encrypted). PIR-06 CRITICAL threshold NOT crossed (formal_removal_notice_detected=false, precursor items 0); escalated-watch carries forward. Net: PIR-07 BATTLEGROUN ASSESSMENT substantially enriched (5 named hot seats + candidate fields + 7 Bersatu-vs-PN clash seats + 103-candidate/seat-structure confirmation). 10/10 sources, 0 errors, all 16 streams HTTP 200.
cycle_summary.key_obstacle_resolved: Utusan article-body extraction fixed: selector upgraded to 'div.elementor-widget-theme-post-content' (Utusan uses Elementor) — both brand-new Utusan PIR-07 articles now extracted in FULL (2455 + 3891 chars). Prior pass only got a related-link heading (32 chars).
cycle_summary.key_obstacle_partial: NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads' full text NOT retrievable this cycle: gnews article URL post-2024 is protobuf-encrypted (base64 decode yields no clean http URL); the gnews article-page (600KB) does not expose the publisher URL in extractable data-attributes/JS via curl; NST /news/nation is JS-rendered (0 article cards in static HTML); Bing + DuckDuckGo title-search returned no direct nst.com.my URL (article too new / results JS-rendered). Headline+publisher+pubDate+PIR-06 tag captured in raw scrape; full body DEFERRED to a daytime-MYT targeted fetch (consistent with prior cycles' documented NST/Star deferral). Astro Awani '36 kerusi bermula esok' headline-only — REDUNDANT with Utusan 3-coalitions (same SPR Ramlan press conference, fully captured). Malaysiakini bodies remain paywalled (lead paragraph captured for 5 priority articles).
cycle_summary.methodology_improvement_this_cycle: Added priority full-text fetcher (_fetch_priority_231029.py) with Utusan Elementor-aware body extraction and gnews-redirect + Bing/DDG fallback attempts for encrypted-URL publishers. Delta-detection now distinguishes 'genuinely brand-new' (WP-API MYT-zoned timestamps within the cycle window — the 2 Utusan articles) from 'homepage-rotation resurfacing' (mkini 'Xh-ago' titles re-entering the top feed). This resolves over-counting: 34 globally-new priority titles reduce to ~2 genuinely brand-new articles + ~32 rotation resurfacings.

critical_pir06_alert.status: ESCALATED WATCH — UNCHANGED. NO formal PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi) removal notice for Bersatu has been issued. CRITICAL threshold NOT crossed (formal_removal_notice_detected=false, precursor items 0). This cycle (07:10 MYT 19 Jul, 5th overnight/dawn pass) added CORROBORATIVE PIR-06 content only: (a) NST 'Negri Sembilan polls: Bersatu at a crossroads amid BN-PN cooperation' (pubDate 23:00 GMT 18 Jul = 07:00 MYT 19 Jul) — headline-level capture, full text deferred (gnews encrypted); corroborates the Muhyiddin exit-positioning thesis captured at 170837. (b) Utusan 'Tiga gabungan bertembung' empirically confirms Bersatu contests 24 DUN seats under its OWN logo (first time) and CLASHES WITH PN CANDIDATES IN 7 SEATS — a tangible PIR-06 schism signal but NOT a formal MT removal notice. Trajectory remains two-sided: PN-MT-may-remove-Bersatu (Kiandee 'asas kukuh' call, captured 153251) AND Bersatu-may-exit-PN (Muhyiddin 'Goodbye PN' hint, captured 170837). Automated CRITICAL-pattern regex matched 0 titles across all 29 files this cycle; precursor-pattern (asas kukuh / kiandee) returned 0.
critical_pir06_alert.negative_confirmation: Automated CRITICAL-pattern regex (formal PN-MT removal-notice phrasing) matched 0 titles across all 29 collected files this cycle. Precursor-pattern (asas kukuh / kiandee) items returned 0. The two PIR-06-relevant items this cycle are NON-triggering: (1) NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads' is ANALYSIS/corroboration of the exit thesis, not an MT-issued notice; (2) Utusan '7 Bersatu-vs-PN clash seats' is an empirical campaign-configuration fact, not a removal notice. Universal Google News 'PN Bersatu (pecat OR keluar OR buang)' feed re-fetched; no formal MT-issued removal notice surfaced (Hadi-denial 'PAS cannot unilaterally kick out Bersatu' still the dominant hit — a 12 Jun NEGATIVE statement, not a notice).

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Negri Sembilan polls: Bersatu at a crossroads amid BN-PN cooperation
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: NST analysis piece framing Bersatu's position post BN-PN pact. Corroborates Muhyiddin exit-positioning. Full text deferred (gnews encrypted / NST JS-rendered). Headline captured.

key_new_evidence_this_cycle.headline: Tiga gabungan bertembung / Bersatu clashes with PN in 7 seats
key_new_evidence_this_cycle.pir_significance: First empirical confirmation that Bersatu (still a PN component) contests 24 DUN seats under its OWN logo and directly clashes with PN candidates in 7 seats — a tangible manifestation of the PN-Bersatu schism on the ballot. NOT a formal MT removal notice.

carryover_primary_evidence.headline: Goodbye PN?: Muhyiddin raps Samsuri over BN talks, Bersatu to move on
carryover_primary_evidence.key_quote: After months of escalating tensions with ally PAS, Bersatu president Muhyiddin Yassin today hinted at the party's possible exit from Perikatan Nasional. In a statement wishing PN 'all the best', Muhyiddin hit out at coalition chairperson Ahmad Samsuri Mokhtar for unilaterally deciding to enter an electoral pact with BN and sidelining Bersatu from seat negotiations.
carryover_primary_evidence.pir_significance: PIR-06 monitor target Muhyiddin has moved from denial/defence to publicly hinting at exit and wishing PN 'all the best'. This is the Bersatu-leadership (not a suspended VP) signaling departure — a qualitative escalation. Direction of motion is now two-sided: PN-MT-may-remove-Bersatu (Kiandee) AND Bersatu-may-exit-PN (Muhyiddin).
carryover_primary_evidence.reconfirmed_this_cycle: Yes (carried in mkini homepage + mkini gnews feed)

carryover_primary_evidence.headline: PN may continue BN cooperation if Negri Sembilan results prove positive, says Samsuri
carryover_primary_evidence.pir_significance: PN chairperson Ahmad Samsuri Mokhtar — the same figure Muhyiddin rapped for unilaterally entering the BN pact — signals PN may CONTINUE the BN cooperation if NS results are positive. This is the PAS/PN side's post-election coalition intent, contingent on the NS result, and notably frames the BN-PN pact continuing (the arrangement Muhyiddin says sidelines Bersatu). First captured at 170837 (1 mention in NST file); re-surfaced in this cycle's NST gnews per-source set. PIR-06 + PIR-07 relevant.

carryover_primary_evidence.headline: Bersatu the only 'true opposition' left following cooperation between BN and PN, says Muhyiddin
carryover_primary_evidence.pir_significance: Muhyiddin reframes Bersatu as sole true opposition post BN-PN pact — consistent with exit positioning. (Utusan Malay-language 'Muhyiddin dakwa Bersatu kini pembangkang tunggal' also reconfirmed this cycle.)

carryover_primary_evidence.headline: Bersatu to form new coalition coming after Negri polls, says Muhyiddin / Bersatu to form new bloc after Negri polls
carryover_primary_evidence.pir_significance: Muhyiddin signals Bersatu will form a NEW coalition/bloc AFTER the Negri Sembilan polls — concrete post-exit plan, pre-nomination-day statement.

carryover_primary_evidence.headline: Negri polls: Bersatu's use of own logo shows it wants to part ways with PN, says Annuar Musa
carryover_primary_evidence.pir_significance: Bersatu sec-gen Annuar Musa publicly states Bersatu wants to part ways with PN (Bersatu contesting under own flag/logo).

carryover_primary_evidence.headline: SNAPSHOT | Johor regent: Excos must be dedicated in their work; Bersatu exit from PN imminent?
carryover_primary_evidence.pir_significance: Mainstream outlet now framing exit as 'imminent?' — narrative has entered imminent-departure framing.

carryover_primary_evidence.headline: PN rift widens as PAS sends clearest signal yet of sidelining Bersatu
carryover_primary_evidence.pir_significance: PAS now openly sidelining Bersatu — the PAS side of the PN-Bersatu fracture.

carryover_primary_evidence.headline: Bersatu tidak lagi mahu bersama PN - Ronald
carryover_primary_evidence.key_quote: Majlis Tertinggi Perikatan Nasional mempunyai asas yang kukuh untuk mengeluarkan Bersatu daripada gabungan Parti Perikatan Nasional. — Datuk Seri Dr. Ronald Kiandee (Bekas Naib Presiden Bersatu / suspended VP, MP Beluran)
carryover_primary_evidence.pir_significance: Malay-language confirmation of the PIR-06 precursor signal first captured at 153251. Kiandee explicitly uses 'mengeluarkan Bersatu' (remove Bersatu) + 'asas kukuh' + 'Majlis Tertinggi'. Still a CALL on PN-MT, not an MT-issued notice.

carryover_primary_evidence.headline: Hadi denies PAS made PN 'toxic', blames Bersatu instead
carryover_primary_evidence.pir_significance: Hadi (PIR-06 monitor target) deflects 'toxic' label onto Bersatu — blame-shifting consistent with the PAS-sidelining-Bersatu framing. Carried in the universal PN-pecat gnews feed this cycle. NOTE: an older Hadi statement ('PAS cannot unilaterally kick out Bersatu from PN', 12 Jun 2026) also persists in the universal pnpecat gnews feed — a NEGATIVE/defensive denial, NOT a removal notice; flagged here to prevent false-positive CRITICAL escalation.

critical_pir06_alert.trajectory_assessment: CRITICAL threshold (formal PN-MT removal notice) NOT crossed and UNCHANGED this cycle (4th overnight pass). The situation has materially escalated (per 170837): the principal (Bersatu president Muhyiddin) is now publicly hinting at exit and signaling a new post-election bloc, and a mainstream outlet is framing exit as 'imminent'. The most likely near-term outcome is Bersatu voluntarily realigning/exiting AFTER the Aug 1 poll rather than a formal PN-MT expulsion beforehand — but a reactive PN-MT removal notice remains possible if Bersatu candidates actively damage PN partners in the 8 Tier-4 seats. Nocturnal window (this cycle, 4th pass) produced no new movement; next meaningful update expected at daytime MYT cycles (campaign Day-2, 19 Jul, ~09:00-12:00 MYT).
critical_pir06_alert.tier4_candidate_withdrawal_trigger: NO Bersatu candidate withdrawals detected in the 8 Tier-4 seats this cycle (or any prior cycle today). (Prior 142040 cycle's Bujang withdrawal was an independent, paperwork-related — not a PIR-06 trigger.)

tier4_seats_bersatu_vs_pn_component.match_to_pir06_list: Utusan 'Tiga gabungan bertembung' (06:45 MYT 19 Jul) confirms Bersatu clashes with PN in 7 DUN seats. The 5-hot-seats article names Bersatu-vs-PN-both-running clashes in at least: Sikamat (Tun Faisal Bersatu vs Razali PN), Ampangan/N.14 (Noor'azah Bersatu vs Rafie PN), Paroi (Nazree Bersatu vs Kamarol PN), Labu (Hanifah Bersatu incumbent vs PN/BN). Full 7-seat enumeration pending the complete candidate list cross-check (manual_senarai-calon captured 130328). Note: Bersatu contests 24 seats total; the 7 are the subset with a direct PN opponent.
seats: (3 further seats pending full cross-check vs 36-seat list)
tier4_seats_bersatu_vs_pn_component.component_split: Bersatu 24 seats (own logo) vs PN (PAS-led) filling 11 seats under BN-PN understanding; PH 36; BN 25.
tier4_seats_bersatu_vs_pn_component.pir06_significance: Empirical ballot-level schism: a PN component (Bersatu) running against its own coalition (PN) in 7 seats under a separate logo is the strongest on-the-ground evidence to date of the PN-Bersatu fracture — but is NOT a formal MT removal notice. No candidate tarik diri in the 8 Tier-4 seats (N.04/05/13/14/23/25/31/34) detected this cycle.

pir09_candidate_credibility.cycle_status: PIR-09 enriched this cycle. N.14 Ampangan Day-1 messaging war now fully baseline-candidate-confirmed: Nazri Kassim (PH, new, PKR NS dep chief) vs Datuk Dr. Mohamad Rafie Ab. Malek (PN, former ADUN) vs Noor'azah Harun (Bersatu) — a THREE-cornered fight (2023 margin 329). MCA president Wee Ka Siong publicly clarifies BN-PN pact is NOT a merger (component-party messaging). Independent-candidate angle: Tamim (surrendered to police) hopes to campaign for an NS independent candidate. Gerakan pecat Tang Jay Son (carryover) unchanged. No new Bersatu-candidate disciplinary action or pecat this cycle.

Youngest 23 (M. Leevineshwaraan, Bersatu); oldest 70 (Abd. Latif A. Tambi, PH).

HIGHEST-WEIGHT PIR-06 channel. No qualitatively new Muhyiddin statement this cycle.

monitor_channels_active.pn_component_parties: ACTIVE (ENRICHED) — Gerakan pecat Tang Jay Son (reconfirmed); MCA president Wee publicly clarifies BN-PN not a merger (NEW this cycle); MCA Youth sec-gen 'stay out' (re-surfaced). No new PAS/Bersatu disciplinary action this cycle.

next_cycle_watch: PIR-06 CRITICAL trigger: ANY formal PN Supreme Council (Majlis Tertinggi) removal notice for Bersatu — keyword watch on 'mengeluarkan Bersatu daripada PN' issued BY the MT (not Kiandee's call ON the MT). The 7 Bersatu-vs-PN ballot clashes are an empirical schism signal but NOT the trigger.
PIR-06: Muhyiddin follow-through on 'new bloc/coalition after Negri polls' — any concrete announcement of Bersatu's new alliance partners.
PIR-06: Any Bersatu candidate tarik diri in the 8 Tier-4 seats (N.04/05/13/14/23/25/31/34) — would signal internal Bersatu collapse. None detected this cycle.

PIR-06: Full text of NST 'Bersatu at a crossroads amid BN-PN cooperation' — recover via direct NST URL at the next daytime-MYT cycle (gnews encrypted; try NST sitemap/section pagination or a later Bing re-index).

PIR-09: N.14 Ampangan Day-2 messaging evolution (Day-2 = 19 Jul MYT daytime) — PH 'defector' attack vs PN 'experienced rep' counter; Noor'azah (Bersatu) third-candidate impact. Candidate field now CONFIRMED: Nazri Kassim (PH) vs Rafie (PN) vs Noor'azah (Bersatu).
PIR-09: MCA president Wee 'not a merger' clarification fallout + MCA Youth sec-gen Saw Yee Fung — whether further BN-component cracks over the BN-PN pact widen.
PIR-09: Independent background vetting — Datuk A Saravanan (N.33) title/establishment background still pending; Tamim's independent-candidate link to follow.
PIR-07: Full 7-seat enumeration of Bersatu-vs-PN clashes (cross-check Utusan 3-coalitions '7 seats' vs the 36-seat candidate list captured 130328).

PIR-07: BN manifesto launch 24 Jul; Day-2 daytime MYT campaign events at T1/T2 seats; any poll/forecast publications. Daytime MYT window (~09:00-12:00 MYT 19 Jul) is NOW OPENING — next cycle expected to capture Day-2 campaign events.
Distractor guard: PRN Johor ke-16 (concurrent) items (Johor exco, regent) surface in NS feeds — keep excluded from NS PIR accounting.
